title: Penunggu Rumah: Buto Ijo
overview: Srini, a single mother, faces disturbances from a giant figure as her child's 6th birthday nears. Seeking help, she contacts her ex, Ali, a horror content creator. Ali and his sister, Lana, agree to assist due to financial struggles. However, as the figure of Buto Ijo appears, terror unfolds, revealing dark secrets in Srini's home.
